lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Don't you try anything, surface-dweller. I'm keeping an eye on you.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Welcome, surface-dweller, to the hidden city of Dorgesh-Kaan!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I don't want to be unfriendly, but I can't help noticing that since surface-dwellers started coming into the city there has been an increase in CRIME!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Surface-dweller! I don't know how you got into the city, but you will never escape!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But... I thought I was allowed into the city!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: You are. I just wanted to say that. And now that you're allowed into the city, I'll never be able to!
